title: Presidio Theatre | San Francisco Concerts
content: # Presidio Theatre. Enjoy live music, dance, and theatre in a beautifully renovated historic theatre. First built as a movie theater for the U.S. Army, the historic Presidio Theatre has been reborn as a modern performing arts space. While those days are gone, today this venue has been beautifully reimagined as a home for affordable live music, dance, theatre, and film. The theatre and its outdoor plaza are also available for rent for public performances, parties, and events of all kinds. ## Getting to Presidio Theatre. ### Presidio Theatre Parking. Paid parking is available in several lots around the Main Post in easy walking distance from the theatre. ### Accessibility at Presidio Theatre. The accessibility features are described on the Presidio Theatre website. And if you want to make your visit a “staycation,” book a room at the nearby Inn at the Presidio or Lodge at the Presidio. Presidio Theatre’s mission is to make live performances accessible to everyone in the community.
